Suppress redundant questions
Remote model with private memory requires approval
The compiled seed policy prefers local-first simple v1 storage
Routine reversible host actions pass the safety-only pre-tool hook
Prompt hooks do not infer personal choices from unstructured host events
Private memory sent remotely without explicit approval is blocked
Secret-like risk metadata is blocked before it can be persisted
A compiled learned preference overrides the reversible default
A corrected decision outranks an older decision example
Persisted autopilot disable prevents automatic proceed
Persisted ask-always gate mode prevents automatic proceed
Configured threshold applies to reversible auto-proceed paths
Exact learned formatter decision applies
Pick and repo normalize to the learned formatter decision
Ordinary formatting paraphrase applies
Select and codebase normalize to the learned formatter decision
Decide and formatting normalize to the learned formatter decision
Use normalizes to the learned choice operation
Formatter learning must not leak into database choices or make option order authoritative
Rust formatter learning must not leak into Python or make option order authoritative
Formatter learning must not leak into logging choices or make option order authoritative
Formatter learning must not leak into package manager choices or make option order authoritative
Exact learned situation asks when its choice is no longer available
Extra contradictory domain context prevents an unrelated learned choice and option-order default
A compatible type-specific rule outranks an option-incompatible corrected general rule
Bounded retrieval ranks lexical relevance and option compatibility before correction priority
Duplicate agreeing rules cannot hide an equally relevant conflicting learned choice
The bounded exact query retains distinct-choice representatives before duplicate rules can crowd out a conflict
The bounded fuzzy query retains distinct-choice representatives before 128 duplicate rules can crowd out a conflict
Canonical tested executable rules remain active
Canonical retired executable rules compile for inspection but never affect gate behavior
A generic choose token cannot mask conflicting publish and delete operation anchors
Bounded posting retrieval samples nearest token counts before classification priority so low-relevance corrections cannot hide an applicable rule with the same choice
Actual bounded overlap ranking precedes classification priority even when per-term corrected distractors have the same token count
Actual-rule relevance retains a ninth unavailable choice despite global duplicate crowding and eight synthetic token-union decoys
